title: Leading environmental and regulatory Partner Terri‑Lee Oleniuk joins McCarthy Tétrault
content:
## Leading environmental and regulatory Partner Terri‑Lee Oleniuk joins McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to welcome Terri‑Lee Oleniuk as a Partner in our Business Law Group in Calgary.
Terri‑Lee is a leading environmental and regulatory lawyer whose practice focuses on project‑related issues arising from natural resource development, with a specialization in regulatory, environmental and Indigenous law. Her work spans the full lifecycle of major projects, from early‑stage approvals through hearings, investigations and strategic regulatory advice.
Terri‑Lee regularly acts for proponents and developers in environmental assessments and regulatory proceedings to secure approvals for significant projects across the oil and gas, pipeline, liquefied natural gas, mining, midstream and petrochemical sectors, as well as electricity transmission, hydroelectric, solar, wind and battery energy storage. Her recent practice has been highly active in the power market, advising clients on both conventional and renewable generation projects.
In addition to her regulatory practice, Terri‑Lee advises clients on a wide range of agreements with Indigenous groups and negotiates complex commercial arrangements on behalf of project developers. She frequently represents clients before administrative tribunals in matters involving tolls and tariffs, regulatory investigations and inquiries, and provides strategic guidance on ESG considerations relevant to major infrastructure and energy mandates.
“Terri‑Lee bolsters our ability to serve clients with major projects in energy, power and infrastructure, particularly those requiring sophisticated regulatory strategy and meaningful Indigenous engagement,” said Matthew Cumming , Partner and Co‑Leader of McCarthy Tétrault’s Business Law Group. Richard O’Doherty , Partner and Co‑Leader of the Business Law Group, added: “Her experience aligns closely with our clients’ needs in Western Canada and across our national platform.”
“Terri‑Lee brings a sophisticated regulatory practice that enhances our ability to guide clients through complex approval processes and stakeholder environments,” said Brett Anderson , Regional Managing Partner for Alberta. “Her arrival further strengthens our Calgary office and our national energy and infrastructure offering.”
Terri‑Lee is admitted to the bars of Alberta, British Columbia and the Northwest Territories. She received a BSc (Physiology) and a JD (with distinction) from the University of Saskatchewan, and an LLM in Energy and Infrastructure Law from Osgoode Hall Law School.
“I am excited to join McCarthy Tétrault and to collaborate with colleagues across the Firm in support of clients navigating complex regulatory and project‑related challenges,” said Terri‑Lee . “The Firm’s national platform and depth across energy, infrastructure and Indigenous law make it an ideal environment to continue serving clients on their most significant mandates.”

### About McCarthy Tétrault’s National Energy Group
A market leader in providing legal support to the energy industry, our National Energy Group helps clients make their most ambitious objectives a reality. From supporting the development, construction, and financing of exciting and transformational projects to helping clients manage their projects’ social and environmental impacts, we have the expertise and foresight to mitigate risks and add value. We support developers, equity investors, lenders, major industrial and commercial users, operators, governments, and government agencies with comprehensive insights into policies, key players, and stakeholders to successfully move energy projects through their life cycles. Discover how our team can help you.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight, and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
- Terri-Lee Oleniuk Partner People.Offices.Singular Calgary
